This installation bundles FFmpeg's libav* libraries, which BinCue Studio links
to decode and probe your audio tracks. FFmpeg is a separate project, not part of
BinCue Studio.

  FFmpeg 8.1.2 — libavformat, libavcodec, libavutil, libswresample
  https://ffmpeg.org
  Copyright the FFmpeg authors.

These DLLs are built from the official FFmpeg 8.1.2 source release
(https://ffmpeg.org/releases/ffmpeg-8.1.2.tar.xz) and are licensed under the GNU
Lesser General Public License, version 2.1 or later (LGPL v2.1+). The build
enables only audio demuxers/decoders and no GPL or nonfree components, so no part
is under the GPL. BinCue Studio links these libraries dynamically (as the
separate DLLs shipped alongside the application), as the LGPL requires.

The exact build configuration (the FFmpeg ./configure line) is in
installer/ffmpeg-audio.cmake in the BinCue Studio source tree. The complete
corresponding source code is the unmodified upstream release linked above and is
also available from https://ffmpeg.org/download.html .

The LGPL license text is available at https://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl-2.1.html
